query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN votingMethod = 'direct' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as direct_votes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN votingMethod = 'delegate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delegated_votes
FROM citizenDelegates
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN votingMethod = 'direct' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as direct_votes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN votingMethod = 'delegate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delegated_votes
